title: Bee Removal in Yonkers, Westchester | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Yonkers, Westchester. Safe, humane bee hive extraction from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call for fast service: $350-$550.
intro: Dealing with a bee problem in Yonkers? Best Pest Control NYC offers professional bee removal services throughout Westchester's fourth-largest city, from Getty Square to the historic Hudson River waterfront. Our licensed technicians safely remove bee colonies and hives from residential and commercial properties across all Yonkers neighborhoods.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Yonkers and Westchester County, our certified bee removal specialists use humane, eco-friendly methods to relocate bees while protecting your property. We provide same-day or next-day service, transparent pricing between $350-$550, and a satisfaction guarantee for all Yonkers residents.
localContext: Yonkers' mix of historic Victorian homes, modern apartment complexes, and commercial districts along Central Avenue creates diverse bee nesting opportunities in chimneys, attics, and building facades. From the hillside neighborhoods near Sarah Lawrence College to the waterfront developments at iPark, our team handles bee infestations in all property types throughout New York's fourth-largest city.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: Bee removal in Yonkers typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the hive location, size of the colony, and accessibility. Ground-level hives are generally less expensive than those in chimneys, walls, or high locations. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before starting any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day bee removal service throughout Yonkers and Westchester County. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an inspection within 24 hours and can often complete the removal on the same visit, depending on the complexity of the infestation.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we use humane relocation methods to preserve bee populations, which are vital pollinators. Our trained specialists carefully extract the hive and relocate the colony to a safe environment. Extermination is only used as a last resort when relocation isn't feasible due to safety concerns or aggressive Africanized bees.

faqs.question: What areas of Yonkers do you service for bee removal?
faqs.answer: We service all Yonkers neighborhoods including Getty Square, Ludlow Park, Crestwood, Park Hill, Homefield, Nepera Park, Bryn Mawr, and the waterfront areas. Our team is familiar with the diverse housing stock throughout Yonkers, from historic homes in the east to newer developments along the Hudson River, and can handle bee removal in any location.
